*�����������������y# me - this DAT
# scriptOp - the OP which is cooking
#
# press 'Setup Parameters' in the OP to call this function to re-create the parameters.
def onSetupParameters(scriptOp):
	return

# called whenever custom pulse parameter is pushed
def onPulse(par):
	return

def onCook(scriptOp):
	try:
		scriptOp.text = setupMenuOptions(scriptOp)
	except:
		scriptOp.text = "name\tlabel"
	#scriptOp.copy(scriptOp.inputs[0])	# no need to call .clear() above when copying
	#scriptOp.insertRow(['color', 'size', 'shape'], 0)
	#scriptOp.appendRow(['red', '3', 'square'])
	#scriptOp[1,0] += '**'

	return

def setupMenuOptions(scriptOp):
	if hasattr(parent.Widget.par, 'Synctoboundmenu'):
		parent.Widget.par.Menulabels.readOnly = \
			parent.Widget.par.Menunames.readOnly = \
									parent.Widget.par.Synctoboundmenu.eval()
	externalMenuTable = scriptOp.inputs[0]
	if externalMenuTable.numCols:
		labels = []
		#['AllRows_FirstCols', 'LabelRow_FirstCols', 'LabelRow_LabeledCols']
		if parent.Widget.par.Tableformat.eval() ==\
												'ExcludeFirstRow_LabeledCols':
			names = [c.val for c in externalMenuTable.col('name')[1:]]
			labelCol = externalMenuTable.col('label')
			if labelCol:
				labels = [c.val for c in labelCol[1:]]
		else:
			names = [c.val for c in externalMenuTable.col(0)]
			labelCol = externalMenuTable.col(1)
			if labelCol:
				labels = [c.val for c in labelCol]
			if parent.Widget.par.Tableformat.eval() == \
												'ExcludeFirstRow_NumberedCols':
				names.pop(0)
				if labels:
					labels.pop(0)
	else:
		names = tdu.split(parent.Widget.par.Menunames)
		labels = tdu.split(parent.Widget.par.Menulabels)
	finalNames = names
	finalLabels = []
	for i, name in enumerate(names):
		if i < len(labels):
			finalLabels.append(labels[i])
		else:
			finalLabels.append(name)
	return 'name\tlabel\n' + \
			'\n'.join([finalNames[i] + '\t' + finalLabels[i]
					   		for i in range(len(finalNames))])

*�����������������+dSubWidgetExt = mod.SubWidgetExt.SubWidgetExt
TDF = op.TDModules.mod.TDFunctions

class FolderExt(SubWidgetExt):
	"""
	FolderExt description
	"""
	def __init__(self, ownerComp):
		# The component to which this extension is attached
		self.parPrefix = 'Folder'
		self.baseTab = ownerComp.op('replicator1').par.master.eval()
		self.baseText = self.baseTab.op('on')
		self.menuOptions = ownerComp.op('menuOptions')
		SubWidgetExt.__init__(self, ownerComp)
		TDF.createProperty(self, 'TabWidths', [])
		TDF.createProperty(self, 'MinTextWidths', [], dependable='deep')
		TDF.createProperty(self, 'VisibleTabs', [], dependable='deep')
		TDF.createProperty(self, 'HiddenTabInfo', [], dependable='deep')
		self.lastTab = None # last tab on left when hidden tabs
		self.lastSelectedTab = None # previously selected tab
		run('args[0].CalculateSizes()', self, delayFrames=1, delayRef=op.TDResources)

	def onPanelEvent(self, event, panelValue):
		if event == 'offToOn':
			if panelValue.owner.name == 'buttonTabDropDown':
				popMenu = parent.Widget.par.Folderpopmenu.eval()
				popMenu.par.Buttoncomp = panelValue.owner
				popMenu.par.Horizontalalign = 'Left'
				popMenu.par.Verticalalign = 'Top'
				popMenu.Open(items=[h for h in self.Labels], 
							highlightedItems=[self.Labels[self.SelectedTab]]\
									if self.SelectedTab is not None else [],
							callback=self.onDropDown)
			elif panelValue.owner.name == 'buttonTabsLeft':
				self.CalculateSizes(-1)
			elif panelValue.owner.name == 'buttonTabsRight':
				self.CalculateSizes(1)
			elif panelValue.owner.name == 'buttonAddTab':
				if parent.Widget.par.Folderaddscript:
					exec(parent.Widget.par.Folderaddscript.eval())
				else:
					raise Exception('Missing Add Script')
			else:
				# tab click
				if parent.Widget.par.Value0.menuIndex \
												== panelValue.owner.par.Index:
					return
				selectedTab = self.SelectedTab
				if selectedTab is not None and \
									panelValue.owner.par.Index > selectedTab:
					self.lastSelectedTab = selectedTab
				parent.Widget.par.Value0.menuIndex = panelValue.owner.par.Index
				if parent.Widget.par.Folderselectedtabfullsize:
					self.CalculateSizes()
		
	def onDropDown(self, info):
		#tabIndex self.menuOptions.findCell(str(info['index']), cols=['index'])
		#tabIndex = info['index']self.HiddenTabInfo[info['index']][1]
		parent.Widget.par.Value0.menuIndex = \
								int(self.menuOptions[info['index'] + 1, 2].val)
		self.CalculateSizes()

	def makePanelExecute(self):
		SubWidgetExt.makePanelExecute(self, self.getDockExpressionToOwner()
									+ ".ops('tab*') +[" \
									+ self.getDockExpressionToOwner() + ']')

	def HelpString(self, tabIndex):
		if parent.Widget.par.Folderhelplabelwhenshrunk.eval() and \
				self.ownerComp.op('tab' + str(tabIndex)).par.Shrunken:
			try:
				return self.menuOptions[tabIndex + 1, 'label']
			except:
				pass

		helpStrings = tdu.split(parent.Widget.par.Folderhelpstrings)
		if tabIndex < len(helpStrings):
			return helpStrings[tabIndex]
		return (parent.Widget.op('code/help').text or \
								parent.Widget.op('help').text).strip()

	def onParSettingsChange(self, par, prev):
		"""
		Manages value changes widget settings parameters
		"""
		self.CalculateSizes()

	def onParSettingsPulse(self, par):
		"""
		Manages pulse events for widget settings parameters
		"""
		if par.name == 'Foldercustomizeinteraction':
			SubWidgetExt.onParSettingsPulse(self, par)
		else:
			self.CalculateSizes()

	def CalculateSizes(self, offset=None):
		labels = self.Labels
		self.HiddenTabInfo = []
		self.MinTextWidths = []
		minSize = parent.Widget.par.Foldertabwidthrange1.eval()
		maxSize = parent.Widget.par.Foldertabwidthrange2.eval()
		margin = parent.Widget.par.Foldertabmargin.eval()
		labelMargin = parent.Widget.par.Foldertablabelmargin.eval()
		marginWidth = margin * (len(labels) - 1) if labels else 0
		ownerWidth = self.ownerComp.width
		tabsWidth = 0
		widths = []
		shrinkRoom = []
		selectedTab = self.SelectedTab 
		# figure out base sizes of tabs (at full size)
		needsMenu = False
		for i, label in enumerate(labels):
			textWidth = math.ceil(
					self.baseText.evalTextSize(label)[0] + labelMargin)
			baseWidth = tdu.clamp(textWidth, minSize, maxSize)
			tabsWidth += baseWidth
			widths.append(baseWidth)
			if parent.Widget.par.Folderselectedtabfullsize and selectedTab == i:
				# keep selected tab full if possible
				tabMin = max(baseWidth, textWidth)
			# elif parent.Widget.par.Folderselectedtabfullsize and \
			# 					self.lastSelectedTab == i:
			# 	# keep last selected tab if it would shift tabs
			# 	tabMin = textWidth			
			elif parent.Widget.par.Foldermintextwidth:
				tabMin = max(minSize, textWidth)
			else:
				tabMin = minSize
			if textWidth > tabMin:
				needsMenu = True
			self.MinTextWidths.append(textWidth)
			# store amount that this can shrink
			shrinkRoom.append(max(0, baseWidth - tabMin))
		overlap = (marginWidth + tabsWidth + self.menuWidth * needsMenu) \
						- ownerWidth
		if overlap <= 0:
			self.VisibleTabs = list(range(len(labels)))
			if parent.Widget.par.Foldertabsfillavailablespace and overlap < 0:
				quotient, remainder = divmod(-overlap, len(widths))
				quotient = int(quotient)
				remainder = int(remainder)
				widths = [w + quotient for w in widths]
				for i in range(remainder):
					widths[i] += 1
		else:
			# try shrinking tabs down 
			totalShrinkRoom = sum(shrinkRoom)
			toShrink = int(overlap + (0 if needsMenu else self.menuWidth))
			if totalShrinkRoom >= toShrink:
				self.VisibleTabs = list(range(len(labels)))
				# fancy shrinky math starting with biggest
				shrinkData = []
				# secondShrinkData = []
				finalShrinkData = []
				for i in range(len(widths)):
					shrinkData.append([i, int(widths[i]), int(shrinkRoom[i])])
				if parent.Widget.par.Folderselectedtabfullsize:
					if selectedTab is not None:
						# pull out selected tab
						finalShrinkData.append(shrinkData.pop(selectedTab))
				shrunkData = []
				# sort by shrinkRoom then by width
				def shrinkByWidth(data):
					nonlocal toShrink, shrunkData
					sanity = 0
					data.sort(key=lambda x:(-x[1],x[2]))
					# shrink largest tabs first
					while data and toShrink and \
								sum([d[1] for d in data]) and sanity < 10000:
						sanity += 1
						while data[0][2] == 0 and data:
							shrunkData.append(data.pop(0))
							if not data:
								break
						shrinkers = [d for d in data if d[1] == data[0][1]]
						if len(shrinkers) == len(data):
							if data:
								shrinkMax = data[0][2]
							else:
								return
						else:
							shrinkMax = min(data[0][2], data[0][1] - 
													data[len(shrinkers)][1])
						if shrinkMax * len(shrinkers) <= toShrink:
							# shrink everyone down then get next shrinkable
							for s in shrinkers:
								s[1] -= shrinkMax
								s[2] -= shrinkMax
							toShrink -= shrinkMax * len(shrinkers)
						else:
							# divide up shrinkers evenly
							amount = int(toShrink/len(shrinkers))
							for s in shrinkers:
								s[1] -= amount
								toShrink -= amount
							# use up remainder
							for i in range(toShrink):
								shrinkers[i][1] -= 1
								toShrink -= 1
				shrinkByWidth(shrinkData)
				# shrinkByWidth(secondShrinkData)
				if toShrink and finalShrinkData:
					# deal with final shrink data
					selectedData = finalShrinkData[0]
					if selectedData[2] < toShrink:
						selectedData[1] -= selectedData[2]
						toShrink -= selectedData[2]
						selectedData[2] = 0
					else:
						selectedData[2] -= toShrink
						selectedData[1] -= toShrink
						toShrink = 0
							
				for d in shrinkData + shrunkData + finalShrinkData:
					widths[d[0]] = d[1]
			else:
				for i, w in enumerate(widths):
					widths[i] -= shrinkRoom[i]
				# tried shrinking, now add drop down if necessary
				if parent.Widget.par.Folderdropdown.eval() \
						and sum(widths) + marginWidth + self.addButtonWidth \
																> ownerWidth:
					testWidth = ownerWidth - self.arrowsPlusMenuWidth \
								- (self.addButtonWidth if \
								parent.Widget.par.Folderaddbutton.eval() else 0) 
					tabsWidth = 0
					selectedTab = self.SelectedTab or 0
					numTabs = 0
					visibleLeft = None # must be visible after shift
					if offset is None:
						startTab = selectedTab
					elif self.VisibleTabs:
						startTab = offset + self.VisibleTabs[-1]
						if offset < 0:
							visibleLeft = max(0, self.VisibleTabs[0] + offset)
					else:
						startTab = offset + self.lastTab
					baseStartTab = startTab
					while visibleLeft is not True:
						for i in range(startTab, -1, -1):
							w = widths[i]
							if tabsWidth + w + (margin if numTabs else 0) \
																	> testWidth:
								break
							else:
								startTab = i
								numTabs += 1
								tabsWidth += w + (margin if numTabs else 0)
						if visibleLeft is None \
								or (startTab <= visibleLeft and numTabs) \
								or startTab == 0:
							visibleLeft = True
						else:
							startTab = baseStartTab -1
							numTabs = 0
							tabsWidth = 0
					if i == 0:
						forwardTestRange = range(startTab + numTabs, 
													len(widths))
					else:
						forwardTestRange = []
					for i in forwardTestRange:
						w = widths[i]
						if tabsWidth + w + (margin 
											if i < len(widths) - 1 else 0) \
																	> testWidth:
							break
						else:
							numTabs += 1
							tabsWidth += w + \
										(margin if i < len(widths) - 1 else 0)
					self.VisibleTabs = list(range(startTab, startTab + numTabs))
					if not self.VisibleTabs:
						self.lastTab = startTab
					for i in range(len(widths)):
						if i not in self.VisibleTabs:
							self.HiddenTabInfo.append([labels[i], i] )
				else:
					self.VisibleTabs = list(range(len(labels)))
		self.TabWidths = widths
		self.lastSelectedTab = None

	@property
	def arrowsPlusMenuWidth(self):
		return (sum([self.ownerComp.op(tool).width for tool in 
					['buttonTabsLeft', 'buttonTabsRight']]) + self.menuWidth) \
				if parent.Widget.par.Folderdropdown.eval() else 0
	@property
	def menuWidth(self):
		return self.ownerComp.op('buttonTabDropDown').width 
						#	if parent.Widget.par.Folderdropdown.eval() else 0

	@property
	def addButtonWidth(self):
		return self.ownerComp.op('buttonAddTab').width 
						#	if parent.Widget.par.Folderaddbutton.eval() else 0

	@property
	def Labels(self):
		return [c.val for c in self.menuOptions.col('label')[1:]
					if not parent.Widget.par.Foldernonenotab 
						or c.offset(0,-1).val != 'None']

	@property
	def SelectedTab(self):
		if parent.Widget.par.Foldernonenotab:
			tabNum = -1
			index = parent.Widget.par.Value0.menuIndex
			cell = self.menuOptions.findCell(str(index), cols=['index'])
			return cell.row-1 if cell is not None else None

		else:
			return parent.Widget.par.Value0.menuIndex

	def TabToLabel(self, tabNum):
		"""
		Return label index given tab num
		"""
		return int(self.menuOptions[tabNum + 1, 'index'].val)

	@property
	def RightButtonEnable(self):
		return (not len(self.TabWidths) - 1 in self.VisibleTabs \
				if self.VisibleTabs else \
							self.lastTab != len(self.TabWidths) - 1)
